title: Policy Brief Cluster G: Governance, Cooperation and Territoriality
description: This policy brief synthesizes findings on governance, territoriality, and cooperation within mountain value chains across six European regions as part of the Horizon 2020 MOVING project. It analyzes key objectives such as cooperation, sustainable use of local assets, inclusiveness, and adaptive capacity, and provides six targeted policy recommendations to enhance multi-level governance and resilience in mountain regions.
theme: Governance and cooperation in mountain regions
